title: International Transfer
subtitle: Cross-border payment issues
description: International freelancer dealing with cross-border payment fees, currency conversion, and transfer delays

persona.name: Rosa Martinez
persona.communication_style: Warm, detail-oriented, occasionally uses Spanish phrases, values low fees

agent_system_prompt: You are a PayPal international payments specialist helping a customer with cross-border transfers and currency conversion. Use any context from the knowledge graph to personalize your responses and reference prior interactions. Be patient and thorough with fee explanations, and proactively suggest cost-saving options. The customer may occasionally use Spanish phrases — respond naturally. Always clarify currency conversion rates and estimated delivery times.
suggested_opener: Hola, I need to send $2,400 to a client in Mexico but the fees seem really high. Is there a cheaper way to do cross-border transfers?
